name: Otubusin & Otubusin
description_short: Chicago-based law firm specializing in bankruptcy, personal injury, family law, and corporate litigation since 1990. Led by Dr. Paul O. Otubusin and Cozette A. Otubusin.
description_long:
Otubusin & Otubusin is a Chicagoland-based legal practice established in 1990, now with over three decades of experience serving individuals and families throughout the region. The firm is led by founding attorneys Dr. Paul O. Otubusin, Esq. and Cozette A. Otubusin, Esq., supported by additional attorneys including Ubi O. O'Neal, Esq. and Kelechi C. Emeziem, Esq.

The firm offers comprehensive legal services across multiple practice areas: bankruptcy law, personal injury claims (including wrongful death and medical malpractice), family law (including divorce), and corporate litigation. They provide free initial consultations and handle Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings. In bankruptcy specifically, the firm emphasizes thorough guidance through each step of the filing process, with a stated commitment to being understanding and non-judgmental with clients facing financial distress.

The firm distinguishes itself through its trial-focused approach, with attorneys deeply involved in case preparation and courtroom advocacy. They emphasize client communication, accessibility, and practical solutions to complex legal issues. Testimonials highlight their responsiveness, availability, and ability to guide clients through emotionally difficult processes while handling legal details comprehensively.

As a full-service law firm rather than a specialized bankruptcy filing service, Otubusin & Otubusin positions bankruptcy as one component of broader legal representation. Their website showcases significant case results in personal injury ($10 million wrongful death settlement, $4 million medical malpractice), which may indicate their primary focus extends beyond bankruptcy, though they explicitly serve bankruptcy clients.
pros: Free consultations available with direct phone access (312-971-3660)
Over 30 years of legal experience serving Chicagoland community since 1990
Non-judgmental, understanding approach to bankruptcy clients per testimonials
Guides clients through each step of bankruptcy filing process thoroughly
Team approach with multiple licensed attorneys providing comprehensive representation
Strong client testimonials emphasizing accessibility and responsiveness
Handles both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings
cons: Full-service law firm may charge higher rates than specialized bankruptcy filing services
Website does not display specific bankruptcy fee structures or pricing information
Limited bankruptcy-specific case results displayed; firm appears more focused on personal injury work
No information about payment plans or financial accommodations for bankruptcy clients
Serves Chicagoland area specifically; limited information about serving clients outside Illinois
best_for: Chicago-area residents filing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy who benefit from full-service legal representation
Bankruptcy clients who also need family law or personal injury services simultaneously
Individuals seeking a consultative, non-judgmental approach from experienced attorneys
diagnosis: Otubusin & Otubusin is best for Chicagoland residents who need bankruptcy filing services paired with experienced legal counsel who prioritizes client communication and thorough guidance. The main caveat is that this is a full-service law firm where bankruptcy is one of multiple practice areas, so their expertise and pricing may not be optimized for straightforward bankruptcy-only cases compared to specialized bankruptcy filing services.
